blocks.body: Future Simple: Questions and Short Answers — Will you...?, Yes, I will. / No, I won't.

{"level":"A1–A2","intro":"In Future Simple questions, put will before the subject and use V1.","rules":[{"label":"Will + subject + V1?","color":"emerald","text":"One pattern works with every subject.","example":"Will you call? / Will she come?"},{"label":"Wh-questions","color":"blue","text":"Put the question word before will.","example":"When will they arrive? / What will you do?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"amber","text":"Repeat will or won't in a short answer.","example":"Yes, I will. / No, she won't."}]}

{"title":"1. Basic patterns","intro":"Put will before the subject.","items":[{"label":"Yes / No question","title":"Will + subject + V1?","subtitle":"Will you help? / Will they stay?"},{"label":"Wh-question","title":"Wh-word + will + subject + V1?","subtitle":"Where will she live? / When will it start?"},{"label":"Positive answer","title":"Yes, subject + will.","subtitle":"Yes, I will. / Yes, they will."},{"label":"Negative answer","title":"No, subject + won't.","subtitle":"No, he won't. / No, we won't."}]}

{"title":"2. Questions and short answers","intro":"Do not repeat the main verb in a short answer.","rows":[{"en":"Will you call me?","ua":"Yes, I will. / No, I won't.","note":"will / won't"},{"en":"Will she be there?","ua":"Yes, she will. / No, she won't.","note":"be remains V1"},{"en":"When will they arrive?","ua":"They'll arrive at six.","note":"wh-word first"}],"warning":"Do not say Do you will...?, Will she comes...?, or Yes, I do."}

{"title":"3. Common mistakes","items":[{"label":"Mistake 1","color":"rose","title":"Adding do before will.","wrong":"❌ Do you will come?","right":"✅ Will you come?"},{"label":"Mistake 2","color":"amber","title":"Changing the verb.","wrong":"❌ Will she calls?","right":"✅ Will she call?"},{"label":"Mistake 3","color":"sky","title":"Answering with do / does.","wrong":"❌ Yes, he does.","right":"✅ Yes, he will."}]}

{"title":"4. Short summary","items":["Question = Will + subject + V1?","Wh-question = Wh-word + will + subject + V1?","Short answers: Yes, ... will. / No, ... won't.","Do not use do / does with will."]}

{"title":"5. Practice","select_title":"Exercise 1. Choose the correct question","select_intro":"Choose the correct Future Simple form.","selects":[{"label":"a) Will she call? / b) Will she calls?","prompt":"Which option is correct?","answer":"a"},{"label":"a) Yes, I do. / b) Yes, I will.","prompt":"Which short answer is correct?","answer":"b"}],"options":["a","b"],"input_title":"Exercise 2. Build a question","input_intro":"Put the words in the correct order.","inputs":[{"before":"you / tomorrow / will / come?","after":"→","answer":"Will you come tomorrow?"},{"before":"when / arrive / they / will?","after":"→","answer":"When will they arrive?"}]}
